creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
@Carlos, could this build issue be relevant for supported releases, or is it *because* the port does or doesn't do something specifically for 8.4 that results in that symptom?

Also, if and when you consider an issue to be resolved, please either provide instructions as a comment (Please close with resolution FOO), or something else so triagers/committers know what you want to do with it from here.
